name: Azure DevOps
description: This app integrates with Azure DevOps to perform investigative and generic actions

actions.name: Get Work Item
actions.description: Get information about a single work item

parameters.name: work_item_id
parameters.description: The work item id

parameters.name: expand
parameters.description: The expand parameters for work item attributes (Possible options are { None, Relations, Fields, Links, All })

parameters.name: asof
parameters.description: AsOf UTC date time string

parameters.name: fields
parameters.description: Comma-separated list of requested fields

parameters.name: work_item_type
parameters.description: The work item type of the work item to create

parameters.name: post_body
parameters.description: Payload to be sent to be created

parameters.name: expand
parameters.description: The expand parameters for work item attributes (Possible options are { None, Relations, Fields, Links, All })

parameters.name: bypass_rules
parameters.description: Do not enforce the work item type rules on this update

parameters.name: suppress_notifications
parameters.description: Do not fire any notifications for this change

parameters.name: validate_only
parameters.description: Indicate if you only want to validate the changes without saving the work item

parameters.name: team
parameters.description: Team ID or team name

parameters.name: timeframe
parameters.description: A filter for which iterations are returned based on relative time (Only Current is supported currently)

actions.name: Add Comment
actions.description: Add a comment on a work item

parameters.name: work_item_id
parameters.description: Id of a work item

parameters.name: comment
parameters.description: The text of the comment

actions.name: Add User
actions.description: Add a user to a project

parameters.name: user_email
parameters.description: The email address of the user to add to the organization

parameters.name: account_license_type
parameters.description: The type of account license. Possible values are: express, stakeholder, advanced, earlyAdopter, professional

parameters.name: group_type
parameters.description: The project group type. Possible values are: projectReader, projectContributor, projectAdministrator, projectStakeholder

parameters.name: project_name
parameters.description: The name of the project

parameters.name: user_id
parameters.description: ID of the user

parameters.name: filter
parameters.description: Equality operators relating to searching user entitlements separated by and clauses

actions.name: Add Attachment
actions.description: Add an attachment to a project

parameters.name: vault_id
parameters.description: SOAR Vault ID of the attachment

parameters.name: api_version
parameters.description: Version of the API to use (overwrites config)

parameters.name: filename
parameters.description: Name of the file to be uploaded
